# Jane Doe

Jane Doe is an engineering lead on the internal data platform team. She is the primary driver of [[project-a]] and coordinates the cross-team review of schema changes, storage choices, and rollout plans. Before taking on the Project Alpha lead role, she spent two years on the developer experience team, where she was responsible for the CI/CD tooling used by every backend service. Jane is the default reviewer for anything that touches warehouse DDL, and she chairs the biweekly data platform sync where cross-team dependencies and blockers are surfaced and tracked to completion.
